initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT account.account_id
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.type = 'SALARY'
GROUP BY client.client_id, account.account_id
ORDER BY client.birth_date DESC, AVG(trans.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account.account_id
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.type = 'SALARY'
GROUP BY client.client_id, account.account_id
ORDER BY client.birth_date DESC, AVG(trans.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.type = 'Příjem'  -- Assuming 'Příjem' means income/salary
GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date DESC, AVG(t.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account.account_id
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.type = 'PAYOUT' AND trans.operation = 'VÝPLATNÍ PŘÍKAZ'
GROUP BY client.client_id, account.account_id
ORDER BY client.birth_date DESC, AVG(trans.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT account.account_id
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.type = 'salary'
GROUP BY client.client_id, account.account_id
ORDER BY client.birth_date DESC, AVG(trans.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.type = 'Příjem'  -- Assuming 'Příjem' means income/salary
GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date DESC, AVG(t.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;
